title: Planning, Dependencies, and Adaptive Decomposition · Control-Loop Lens: Dependency Graph
summary: Plan a migration whose dependencies and risks emerge during work. Planned artifact: Add and verify the loops dependency graph increment in a dependency-aware adaptive execution plan. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Order outcomes by prerequisite evidence rather than arbitrary file sequence.
Preserve goal state, decisions, tests, and next actions across sessions.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
